'''Sacorria''' was the primary star of the [[Outlier systems]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

==Behind the scenes==
This planet was made non-canon when [[Sacorria]]'s system mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' (the [[Outlier systems]]) was completely reorganized (as the [[Sacorrian system]]) with new planets and a new star in the most modern sources.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
